_comment: Ready-to-paste entry for the official `claude-plugins-official` marketplace. To submit airlock to the default /plugin directory: open a PR against Anthropic's marketplace repo and add this object to its `plugins` array. Bump `ref` to each new release tag. Self-hosting needs NOTHING here — `/plugin marketplace add Iskz17/airlock` already works.
name: airlock
description: Layered prompt-injection / agent-security guard. Scans WebFetch/WebSearch content for injection (incl. invisible-Unicode ASCII smuggling), gates outbound exfiltration of secrets/PII and Markdown-URL sinks (EchoLeak), checks task drift before sensitive actions, vets installed MCP servers for tool poisoning, and blocks poisoned memory writes.
